# SM Developers (SMD)

SM Developers is a professional SaaS utilities platform providing high-performance, free tools for developers, traders, and SEO specialists. Our mission is to democratize access to premium-grade technical utilities without the friction of subscriptions or data tracking.

## Core Services

### SEO Utilities
- **Schema Validator & Generator**: Create and validate JSON-LD structured data for Google compatibility.
- **SERP Preview**: Real-time simulation of website appearance in search results.
- **On-Page SEO Checker**: Full audit of metadata, heading hierarchy, and technical SEO signals.
- **AI Content Intelligence**: Detect machine-generated text and humanize robotic phrasing using heuristic linguistic engines.
- **Keyword Intelligence**: Suggestion and volume estimation for long-tail search opportunities.

### Trading Calculators
- **Market Pivots**: Standard, Woodie, and Camarilla support/resistance calculations.
- **Risk Management**: Scientific position sizing and risk/reward ratio calculators.
- **Profit/Loss Analysis**: Instant net profit calculation including edge costs like break-even points.

### Content & Learning
- **Sitemap & Robots.txt**: Clean generation of indexing instructions for search engines.
- **JSON Formatter**: High-speed, secure formatting of raw data structures.

## Technical Philosophy
- **Privacy First**: Zero data tracking. We do not store user inputs or personal identifiers.
- **Zero Friction**: No registration or login required for core utilities.
- **High Performance**: Edge-optimized functions for low-latency results worldwide.
- **Always Free**: Our core suite of professional tools is committed to remaining free forever.

## Contact & Links
- Website: https://smdevelopers.xyz
- Documentation: https://smdevelopers.xyz/docs
- Privacy Policy: https://smdevelopers.xyz/privacy
- Support: support@smdevelopers.io
